title: Pfizer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Pfizer India is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Pfizer India has an exciting opening for a Consultant Physician at our Kolkata office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Pfizer India:
Pfizer India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pfizer India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
